title: i2b2/ONT to OMOP Concept Mapping
description: Reference mappings from i2b2 ontology (clinical element categories) and i2b2 fact tables to OMOP CDM domains. This is a stub for Phase 4 implementation. Actual ETL will use i2b2-to-OMOP converters and hierarchical concept mapping.
note: Phase 4 will implement ETL from i2b2 PostgreSQL instances (observation_fact, patient_dimension, visit_dimension) to OMOP via SQL mapping queries. This stub documents the conceptual equivalences.

table_mappings.mapping_logic: visit_num → visit_occurrence_id; inout_cd (E/I/A) → visit_type_concept_id; encounter_num cross-reference

ICD9.mapping: ICD9 code → ICD9 vocabulary_id in OMOP, then via concept_relationship Maps-to SNOMED

ICD10.mapping: ICD10 code → ICD10 vocabulary_id in OMOP, then via concept_relationship Maps-to SNOMED

SNOMED.mapping: SNOMED code direct match to OMOP SNOMED vocabulary

LOINC.mapping: LOINC code direct match to OMOP LOINC vocabulary

RxNorm.mapping: RxNorm code direct match to OMOP RxNorm vocabulary

LOCAL.mapping: i2b2 LOCAL: codes must be pre-mapped to OMOP via institutional ontology bridge

temporal_mapping.note: i2b2 stores start_date/end_date in observation_fact; these map directly to OMOP date fields

units_and_normalization.note: i2b2 UNITS_CD field → OMOP unit_concept_id via SNOMED or UCUM mapping
units_and_normalization.challenge: i2b2 units may be non-standard; Phase 4 ETL must normalize

hierarchical_concept_handling.note: i2b2 ontology paths (e.g., \Actvities\Lab\Chemistry\Glucose\) → OMOP concept_ancestor relationships
hierarchical_concept_handling.i2b2_tool: Uses i2b2 ontology loader to parse concept paths
hierarchical_concept_handling.omop_requirement: Load parent concepts and generate concept_ancestor relationships

phase_4_roadmap: Create i2b2 PostgreSQL → OMOP INSERT mapping SQL (domain-specific per table)
Implement unit normalization: i2b2 UNITS_CD → SNOMED UCUM → OMOP concept_id
Implement hierarchical concept ingest: i2b2 path → OMOP concept_ancestor
Add gender/age mapping validation (OMOP person constraints)
known_challenges: LOCAL: codes require institutional ontology mapping; cannot auto-convert without domain knowledge
Units: i2b2 allows free-text units; must harmonize before OMOP load
Missing values: i2b2 null semantics may differ from OMOP; requires ETL logic decision
Hierarchies: i2b2 path structure not fully representable in OMOP; concept_ancestor is partial approximation
